name: Cashew and Tomato Brown Rice
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Sun Dried Tomato Oil (or olive oil)
12 Sun-Dried Tomatoes, packed in oil, drained and chopped
Peel of 2 Lemons – grated (without the white pith)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, heat the sun dried tomato oil until fairly hot.
2. Add the onions, garlic, celery, and carrots; cook over medium heat for 10 minutes or until the vegetables soften.
3. Stir in the brown rice and cook until the rice begins to puff slightly, about 5 minutes longer.
4. Stir in the sun-dried tomatoes, chopped tomatoes with juice, and vegetable stock. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Remove the cover; stir in the lemon peel, lemon juice, cashews, and basil. Continue cooking an additional 15–20 minutes or until the rice is tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
